title: Peanut Curry Sauce
summary: A rich, velvety curry sauce packed with peanuts, coconut & Thai spice. Comes together fast & keeps for weeks. Pour it over literally anything.

method.description: Finely grate the garlic. Finely slice the coriander, stalks and all. Whisk the peanut butter through the stock.

Set a saucepan over a medium-high heat and pour in half of the coconut milk. Let it bubble away, stirring now and then, until the fat splits and the solids start to toast and brown slightly, this gives the sauce loads of flavour.
Stir in the curry paste, coriander and garlic. Cook for 2-3 mins until fragrant.
Pour the soy sauce and let it fully evaporate. Then add the passata, bring to the boil and simmer for 5-10 mins until slightly thickened.

Pour in the peanutty stock mixture along with the rest of the coconut milk. Stir to combine, bring back to the boil and then reduce the heat. Simmer for 15–20 mins, stirring occasionally, until thickened to your liking.
Once it’s nice and glossy, taste and season with salt, black pepper and a good squeeze of lime juice.

Pour the sauce into a clean, heatproof jar and seal it tightly. Let it cool fully before storing (if sealed properly, it’ll keep at room temperature for 1 month. If not sealed, store it in the fridge and use within 2 weeks).

tips: You can use any stock here, but chicken or vegetable work best.
Add chilli flakes or fresh red chilli for a more fiery version.
Before freezinf or chilling make sure the sauce has properly cooled.
Thai Red Curry Paste → Yellow or Massaman Curry Paste
Smooth Peanut Butter → Crunchy Peanut Butter

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
